personas.name: Marcus Lee
personas.role: Assesses team readiness and executes interventions from Slack

personas.name: Employee Agent
personas.role: Aggregates Salesforce and Cornerstone signals, recommends and executes readiness actions

content.text: Is my team ready for the upcoming AI platform rollout?

content.statusText: Analyzing skills, learning progress, and compliance signals...

content.text:
I've analyzed your team across Salesforce and Cornerstone.

*Team readiness snapshot*
• Ready: 3 engineers
• At-risk: 4 engineers
• Not ready: 2 engineers

Your team is partially ready for the AI platform rollout.

Choose an action below to continue.

I've noticed a few high-impact gaps you can close quickly.

*Top skill gaps*
• Model deployment workflows
• AI system monitoring
• Data pipeline debugging

*Compliance risk*
• 2 engineers are missing AI governance training

You can take action now and I can orchestrate it for you.

Choose an action below to continue.

content.statusText: Assigning learning and notifying compliance-risk employees...

content.text:
I've handled the actions.

• Learning assigned to 4 at-risk engineers
• Compliance reminders sent to 2 engineers
• Progress tracking is now active for this rollout

Choose an action below to continue.

*Individual readiness view opened*

You can now review:
• Readiness score by engineer
• Skill gaps per person
• Learning completion progress
• Suggested mentors

Update on your team readiness:

• 2 engineers improved to *Ready*
• 1 compliance task completed
• 1 engineer is still at risk

Want me to follow up with them?

Choose an action below to continue.

I've handled the follow-up.

• Reminder sent to the remaining at-risk engineer
• Their manager received a suggested mentor pairing prompt
• I'll continue monitoring progress and notify you of movement

Your team is now *80% ready* for the AI platform rollout.

• 1 engineer still needs support
• Recommendation: pair them with a mentor this week to de-risk launch readiness
